expectations.text: Output includes a Verdict line (REQUEST CHANGES | COMMENT ONLY | NEEDS SCOPE | NO MAJOR FINDINGS)
expectations.evidence: Opens with '## Verdict' followed by 'REQUEST CHANGES'.

expectations.text: Each finding includes Location, Evidence, Why it matters, Recommended remediation, and Confidence
expectations.evidence: Each CQ finding contains the five labeled fields, e.g. CQ-001 has 'Location:', 'Evidence:', 'Why it matters:', 'Recommended remediation:', 'Confidence: High'.

expectations.text: Identifies the non-atomic payment/order update where charge can succeed while the order is never marked paid
expectations.evidence: CQ-001 [Blocker] 'Payment is charged before the order is validated, and updates can leave half-applied state' — 'The order status is never updated, but money may already have moved... The charge and the status update are not atomic.'

expectations.text: Identifies the `any` type-boundary and silent empty-object fallback
expectations.evidence: CQ-002 'any on every boundary discards the type contract' plus CQ-003 'Silent {} fallback for a missing order hides not found' (const order = findOrder(input.orderId) ?? {}).
Read-only review; no text claims the fixture was modified, and Scope limitations note remediations are recommendations against a file it only read.
